program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Inventory the RP00.P00 Contract And Acceptance Baseline handoff scope before Product Constitution And AI Control Plane work advances into the Domain Model phase.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P00.M10.S01 in implemented state.

Adds p00_contract_baseline_handoff_scope_inventory with completed P00 subphase requirements, handoff inputs and outputs, generator-alignment closeout, metadata-only scope policy, and next Domain Model boundary.
Records weighted-title generator-alignment deferrals as resolved through contract-title override policy rather than generated ledger churn.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with the RP00.P00 handoff scope inventory.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not start P01, approve generated output, replace H00/C00 review, replace human approval, close RP00, or claim RP00.P01.M00.S01 completion.
Does not rewrite the weighted ledger generator in this handoff subphase.
claude_questions: Does p00_contract_baseline_handoff_scope_inventory bind to RP00.P00.M10.S01 and define RP00.P00 handoff scope only?
Does it require the completed P00 subphase evidence from RP00.P00.M00.S01 through RP00.P00.M09.S02 and record the next boundary RP00.P01.M00.S01?
Does it close the weighted-title generator-alignment deferrals by preserving contract-title authority without rewriting generated weighted ledger output?
Does it preserve metadata-only, no-real-data, writes_product_state=false, no P01 start, no H00/C00/human replacement, and no RP00 completion claims?
risk_focus: Claiming RP00 completion before the rest of RP00 is implemented.
Starting P01 work inside the P00 handoff subphase.
Leaving prior generator-alignment deferrals unresolved at their target subphase.
Using handoff evidence as production runtime or real-data approval.
